fund_description: Leading venture capital firm with dedicated gaming fund investing across consumer, games, and social platforms
fit_rationale: a16z is the most influential VC in gaming with dedicated $600M Games Fund. Andrew Chen leads gaming investments and wrote the book on growth. Unparalleled network and platform resources.
warm_signal_note: Andreessen publicly discusses AI transformation of gaming; portfolio overlap with other targets

fund_description: Multi-stage VC with dedicated gaming practice, investing across interactive entertainment and immersive experiences
fit_rationale: Lightspeed has one of the largest dedicated gaming practices in VC. Baier-Lentz is a former professional gamer turned investor. Deep thesis on immersive entertainment and virtual worlds.

fund_description: Largest VC fund dedicated solely to gaming with $1B+ AUM, investing across game studios, platforms, and infrastructure
fit_rationale: Griffin is the pure-play gaming fund with $1B+ dedicated to gaming. Team includes former game executives from Activision, EA, Tencent. Deep operational expertise in gaming.
warm_signal_note: Co-investor overlap with BITKRAFT and other gaming-focused targets in pipeline

fund_description: Early-stage gaming fund backing innovative game developers and interactive entertainment companies
fit_rationale: Transcend is a gaming-native fund with strong early-stage focus. Shanti has deep gaming industry network and has backed breakout hits. Good fit for seed-stage game studios.

fund_description: European gaming and metaverse fund investing in games, esports, and spatial computing
fit_rationale: Hiro is the leading European gaming fund with strong metaverse thesis. Luke is a serial gaming entrepreneur. Geographic diversification for pipeline with European focus.
